evals.prompt: Write a blog post about why black pepper dramatically enhances the absorption of turmeric — the science behind piperine and curcumin, the traditional uses in Ayurveda and TCM, and how to use them together in cooking. Target people searching for 'black pepper turmeric benefits'.
evals.expected_output: A 1000-1500 word SEO blog post with: primary keyword in first paragraph and at least one H2, meta description ~150 chars, verified internal links to /ingredients/black-pepper and /ingredients/turmeric at minimum plus relevant recipe links, health language that distinguishes research from tradition, Ancient Pantry voice (grounded, no hype), YAML metadata block, and a final checklist verification.

evals.prompt: Write an Ancient Pantry blog post on warming winter spices — which spices from TCM and Ayurveda are considered 'warming', why they matter in cold months, and how to use them. Include links to at least 4 different ingredients and 2 recipes from the site.
evals.expected_output: A 1000-1500 word post with: at least 4 verified ingredient links, at least 2 recipe links, /traditions/ayurveda and /traditions/traditional-chinese-medicine linked, seasonal angle developed, Ancient Pantry voice maintained, YAML metadata block with tags including 'tcm', 'ayurveda', 'warming'.

evals.prompt: Write a blog post about miso — its history in Japanese and Chinese cooking, its fermentation process, probiotic properties, and how to cook with it without killing the beneficial bacteria. Target the keyword 'how to use miso'.
evals.expected_output: A focused how-to post with: how-to keyword naturally integrated, links to /ingredients/miso and any miso recipes, gut health language properly qualified, at least one FAQ section targeting a featured snippet, YAML metadata block, Ancient Pantry voice.
